meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Git with AI: Master Your Workflow and Stop Being Overwhelmed
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tools. Master Git with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to streamline your freelance development, ship faster, and impress clients.
content.answer_block: The overwhelm of modern AI development stems from fragmented workflows. By integrating Git with AI-native tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform your codebase into a context-aware system. This allows you to treat AI as a senior pair programmer that understands your repo history, ensuring consistent, high-velocity output.
content.intro:
The modern freelance landscape has become a chaotic sprawl of fragmented AI assistants, unmanaged context windows, and 'copy-paste' fatigue. You find yourself spending more time prompting than building, losing hours to context switching while your delivery timeline slips further into the red. 

But the chaos isn't the AI—it's the workflow. By treating Git as the single source of truth and leveraging AI agents that operate directly within your terminal, you reclaim your focus. It's time to stop fighting the tools and start orchestrating them into a high-octane development engine that turns requirements into shipped features in record time.

steps.title: Initialize Context-Aware Repositories
steps.description: Before any AI can help, it needs to understand your project structure. We initialize a clean Git repo with a comprehensive .gitignore to prevent AI hallucination on build artifacts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this directory and generate a comprehensive .gitignore file for a modern TypeScript/React project, including environment variables and build output.

steps.title: Automate Commit Hygiene
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate semantic commit messages based on your code diffs. This maintains a clean history that AI agents can parse later for context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my current staged changes and write a conventional commit message following the Angular convention.

steps.title: AI-Driven Branch Management
steps.description: Stop manual branch naming. Use AI to analyze your ticket and create a descriptive branch name that aligns with your project management system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Given this feature request, suggest a short, descriptive branch name following the format feature/ticket-id-summary.

steps.title: Contextual Code Review
steps.description: Instead of manual self-review, use Claude Code to perform a diff analysis against your project's architectural standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the changes in this branch against the existing codebase architecture. Look for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks.

steps.title: Automated Pull Request Documentation
steps.description: Turn your code changes into professional documentation for your clients instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a summary of the changes in this pull request for a non-technical client, focusing on the business value provided.

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to exclude large assets or vendor folders to save on token costs and improve AI reasoning.
Use Git hooks to trigger Claude Code reviews automatically before every push to catch edge cases early.
Chain your prompts: Ask Antigravity for the logic, then use Claude Code to apply it to the actual file structure.
Keep your commits atomic; AI agents perform significantly better when analyzing single-purpose changes rather than massive refactors.
Tag your main releases with semantic versioning to provide 'checkpoints' for AI agents when debugging regression issues.
resources: Git Best Practices for AI Workflows: https://git-scm.com/doc
content.next_steps: Now that your workflow is automated, audit your most repetitive coding task and create a custom prompt template for it in your Antigravity library.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to outpace any developer relying on manual processes. Stop juggling tools and start shipping value. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
